note: ModelSpec + Provenance frozen dataclasses; REGISTRY has exactly 29 specs (one per ModelName), endpoints as frozenset with the 5 cross-cutting sets from IO_SPEC section 2, web-only + OPERA/PBPK carry env_manifest=entrypoint=None, gpu opt collapses to requires_gpu=False, provenance carries only the known access_tag (per-model commit/citation/license land with each model, not fabricated). registry_validate() enforces the invariants for the core gate.
